summary: Nice capture of the boys at Firebird Lake with solid recording quality
review: The reviewer praises Mr. Darby for doing a very nice job capturing the performance, indicating a clear and well‑balanced recording. No specific musical details or song highlights are mentioned.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review with a 4‑star rating that focuses on the recording quality; no comments on the musical performance, so rating reflects good sound but uncertain show quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes a very nice job of capturing the band, implying clear and well‑balanced audio.
